text:
Created attachment 229028
Boot Hang

I have a TrueNAS 12 system (using FreeBSD 12 under the hood) which suddenly stopped booten with the message "KDB: debugger backends: ddb" (see attachements). The system is a Supermicro Server CSE-848X 4x 12C Xeon E7-4850 v2 2,3GHz 256GB ECC.

There was no update or anything done. After a regular shutdown it comes not up anymore. SLIT tables shoes my 4 NUMA nodes but then stops, going into a reboot cycle which then finally comes to hold / hang.
